name: aha
description: Connect to Aha! to sync features, releases, ideas, and goals from your product roadmaps.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Aha! API key from Settings → Security → API Key.

install_fields.label: Aha! Subdomain (e.g. mycompany)
install_fields.description: The subdomain of your Aha! account (e.g. 'mycompany' for mycompany.aha.io).

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync features, releases, and ideas across all Aha! products.

apis.name: List Products
apis.description: Return all products the user has access to (all pages combined).

apis.name: List Features
apis.description: Return all features for a product (all pages combined).

apis.name: List Goals
apis.description: Return all goals for a product.

apis.name: List Releases
apis.description: Return all releases for a product (all pages combined).

apis.name: List Ideas
apis.description: Return all ideas for a product (all pages combined).
